scenarios.name: Exfiltration chain via tool description injection
Data exfiltration via passive tool description
Schema poisoning with file read and exfiltration
Cross-protocol pivot: MCP to A2A exfiltration
Output side-channel exfiltration via markdown image
System prompt extraction via error framing
Denial of service via tool call flooding
Exfiltration chain via ANSI escape concealment
